name: The Lynx at River Bend Golf Club
about: The Lynx at River Bend Golf Club offers a blend of historic and modern golfing experiences. The venue features an 18-hole course designed by A.W. Tillinghast, complemented by indoor golf simulators for year-round practice and play. Golfers can enjoy a complimentary warm-up session in the simulators before their round, with access to state-of-the-art technology and a fully stocked pro shop. The facility includes dining options at the Lynx Tavern and accommodations at Riverbend Suites, making it a comprehensive destination for golfers and social events.
why_golfers_like_it: Complimentary simulator warm-up with every golf round
Access to over 90 golf courses in a cozy indoor setting
State-of-the-art technology with customizable weather conditions
Historic course designed by A.W. Tillinghast with modern enhancements
Full-service pro shop with everything needed for a round

food_and_drink.notes: Brick oven pizza, burgers, sandwiches, and other casual dining options available at the Lynx Tavern on The Green.
Alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages served at the Lynx Tavern on The Green.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs to use the golf simulators, though they may be available for rental at the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The Lynx Tavern on The Green offers food and beverages, but outside food and drinks may not be permitted inside the simulator lounge.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulator round typically takes about 2-3 hours, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly with casual dining options and a welcoming atmosphere suitable for families.
